parameters.shellCommand:
python - <<'PY'
import sys, json, pathlib
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Tuple

# Reader je nach Endung
def read_any(p: Path) -> Tuple[str,str]:
    s = p.suffix.lower()
    if s=='.pdf':
        from pypdf import PdfReader
        txt=''.join(page.extract_text() or '' for page in PdfReader(str(p)).pages)
        return txt, 'application/pdf'
    if s=='.docx':
        import docx
        d=docx.Document(str(p))
        return '
'.join([para.text for para in d.paragraphs]), 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'
    if s=='.rtf':
        from striprtf.striprtf import rtf_to_text
        return rtf_to_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore')), 'application/rtf'
    if s=='.txt':
        return p.read_text(errors='ignore'), 'text/plain'
    if s=='.doc':
        import subprocess
        out = subprocess.check_output(['antiword', str(p)], text=True, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
        return out, 'application/msword'
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore'), 'application/octet-stream'

payload=json.load(sys.stdin)
p=Path(payload['path'])
text,mime=read_any(p)
print(json.dumps({"path":str(p),"filename":p.name,"mime":mime,"text":text}))
PY

parameters.functionCode: const crypto=require('crypto');const t=$json.text||'';const name=$json.filename;const hash=crypto.createHash('sha256').update(t).digest('hex');return [{json:{filename:name, mime:$json.mime, text:t, sha256:hash, size:Buffer.from(t,'utf8').length}}];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO documents(filename,mime_type,sha256,size_bytes)
VALUES(:filename,:mime,:sha256,:size)
ON CONFLICT (sha256) DO UPDATE SET filename=EXCLUDED.filename
RETURNING id;

parameters.functionCode: const text=$json.text||'';const CH=1800;const chunks=[];for(let i=0,idx=0;i<text.length;i+=CH,idx++){chunks.push({json:{chunk_index:idx, content:text.slice(i,i+CH)}});}return chunks;

parameters.shellCommand:
python - <<'PY'
import sys,json
from gensim import corpora, models
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize

pl=json.load(sys.stdin)
text=pl.get('content','')
words=[w.lower() for w in word_tokenize(text) if w.isalpha()]
stop=set(stopwords.words('german'))
words=[w for w in words if w not in stop]
cat='allgemein';dist={}
if len(words)>=40:
    d=corpora.Dictionary([words])
    c=[d.doc2bow(words)]
    lda=models.LdaModel(c, id2word=d, num_topics=5, passes=2)
    topics=lda.show_topics(num_topics=1, num_words=6, formatted=False)
    cat=

.join(w for w,_ in topics[0][1])
    dist={int(t):float(p) for t,p in lda.get_document_topics(c[0])}
print(json.dumps({"lda_top_topic":cat,"lda_topic_dist":dist}))
PY

messages.content: Gib eine knappe KATEGORIE (1-4 Worte, DE) für den folgenden Text. Antwort nur mit der Kategorie, ohne Erklärungen.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO categories(name,source,confidence)
VALUES(:category_name,'LDA+OpenAI',0.85)
ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET updated_at=NOW()
RETURNING id AS category_id;

WITH doc AS (SELECT id FROM documents ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
INSERT INTO chunks(document_id,chunk_index,content,tokens,lda_top_topic,lda_topic_dist,category_id)
VALUES ((SELECT id FROM doc), :chunk_index, :content, char_length(:content), :lda_top_topic, :lda_topic_dist::jsonb, :category_id)
RETURNING id, category_id;
